one_time_description: Impairment writedown on investment in Great Lakes Hospitality Group Limited Partnership
economic_notes: First Nation has 51% interest in Helios Whitefish River Limited Partnership (portfolio method), 16.55% interest in Mnidoo Mnising Power Limited Partnership (portfolio method), and 1 of 7 shares in Great Lakes Hospitality Group Limited Partnership hotel/conference centre on Manitoulin Island. Fully consolidated subsidiaries: Whitefish River Development Corporation and Birch Island Construction Company.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 (year ended March 31, 2021). Two fully consolidated subsidiaries: Whitefish River Development Corporation and Birch Island Construction Company. Total government transfers of $15,220,304 per deferred revenue note reconciliation. OSR calculated as total revenue $16,439,749 minus total government transfers $15,220,304 = $1,219,445. Accounts receivable includes $1,589,383 trade receivables and $118,762 band member receivables. Long-term debt includes CMHC mortgages secured by ISC Ministerial guarantee. Annual debt service of $325,856 per cash flow statement (repayment of long term debt $320,598 plus loans payable $5,258). No schedule of remuneration provided. COVID-19 uncertainty note included. Prior year accumulated surplus restated: note shows $29,520,206 opening but $3,008,532 allocation suggesting prior surplus was restated; comparative figures may have been adjusted.
